lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooo? Woooo woo woooooo wooooo woooowooo wooo woooooo woo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't say?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Woo! WOO WOOOOO WOOWOOWOO WOO WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't say!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooowoowoooooo.... Woowoowoo? Woooo, wooowoo wooowooowooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I guess you didn't say.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooo? Woooo woo woooooo wooooo woooowooo wooo woooooo woo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I don't want to brag, but seriously: I am SOOOO rich....

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Woo! WOO WOOOOO WOOWOOWOO WOO WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I know they say money doesn't bring you happiness, but sometimes I just like to open my bank account and look at all of the stuff I own and just think to myself:

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Wow. I am soooooo rich.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooowoowoooooo.... Woowoowoo? Woooo, wooowoo wooowooowooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, us rich alive people don't want to waste all day spending time with you poor dead people, because I'm just sooooo rich I have to go now, and very possibly make myself even richer.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See ya around ghosty!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooo? Woooo woo woooooo wooooo woooowooo wooo woooooo woo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, I heard about that, ha-ha-ha!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Woo! WOO WOOOOO WOOWOOWOO WOO WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: With a MACKEREL? Ouch!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooowoowoooooo.... Woowoowoo? Woooo, wooowoo wooowooowooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, it was fun. Let's do it again sometime.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooo? Woooo woo woooooo wooooo woooowooo wooo woooooo woo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why, thank you very much!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Woo! WOO WOOOOO WOOWOOWOO WOO WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I know, but what are you going to do?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooowoowoooooo.... Woowoowoo? Woooo, wooowoo wooowooowooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, I guess that's always true in the long run. See you around, weird invisible dead person!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooo? Woooo woo woooooo wooooo woooowooo wooo woooooo woo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah it's not bad, but I prefer cooked chicken.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Woo! WOO WOOOOO WOOWOOWOO WOO WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Maybe, but nothing beats a home cooked pie!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Man, I love pie!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooowoowoooooo.... Woowoowoo? Woooo, wooowoo wooowooowooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't say? I never knew that. Well, I must be going, see you around.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooo? Woooo woo woooooo wooooo woooowooo wooo woooooo woo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: We get signal!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Woo! WOO WOOOOO WOOWOOWOO WOO WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Somebody set up us the bomb!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooowoowoooooo.... Woowoowoo? Woooo, wooowoo wooowooowooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You have no chance to survive make your time.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Woo?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: All your base are belong to us.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, don't think you can talk to me like that!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Woo! WOO WOOOOO WOOWOOWOO WOO WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you threatening me?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooowoowoooooo.... Woowoowoo? Woooo, wooowoo wooowooowooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Just because you're already dead, doesn't mean I can't find a way to hurt you ghosty!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I've never been there in my life and CERTAINLY didn't steal anything when I was!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Woo! WOO WOOOOO WOOWOOWOO WOO WOOOOO!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Are you calling me a liar?!?! I have never stolen a thing in my life, and I resent the implication that I am the kind of morally depraved individual that would steal someone else's hard earned

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: money from their very pockets!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Or cakes. Or fur. Repeatedly. For long periods at a time.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Wooowoowoooooo.... Woowoowoo? Woooo, wooowoo wooowooowooo!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well if you are going to take that attitude, then I have nothing further to say on the matter, and bid you good day!

sections.title: During Curse of the Empty Lord

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Rennard.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Ah, it be you again! What can I do fer ya?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I can find Kharrim again?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Kharrim the messenger... Well, he was always a devoted follower of old General Zamorak, and if I remember rightly Zamorak set up a small base in an old temple near Dareeyak...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: You might want to check around there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Kharrim the messenger... Last I'd heard of him, he'd headed off to Carrallagar to seek his fortune. Ya might want to check around there somewhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Kharrim the messenger... The last I'd heard of that weasel he was claiming he'd found some underground deposit of runite ore guarded by demons and dragons.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: I suspect he was pulling some scam or other, but if you know of such a place, that might be a good place to start checking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello. You must be Rennard.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: What be this? You both see me and hear me, and also know my name?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Tell me what devilry brings you here, and be quick about it afore I gut you like a fish!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, apart from the fact I ain't scared of no ghost, I am here because I have spoken to Valdez.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Valdez? Who be that? Some foul necromancer?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, he was a ghost I met near Glarial's tomb.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: He seems convinced that the artefact you stole from him is responsible for him becoming cursed to be an invisible ghost.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Seems like he might be onto something too, given the state of you.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: A curse ye say... Aye, that makes sense...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: And there was I thinking my fate be the fault of the thieving and murdering I spent me life a-doing...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: So it all began the day I stole that staff, ye say? Aye, that be a story I have never told another soul...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Why don't you tell me what happened? I might be able to help...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Well, I was making me merry way along, having just pulled off a glorious jewellery heist from a bunch of stinking dwarves...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hey, that's no way to talk about dwarves! Some of my best friends are short!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Ah, yer misunderstand me [lad/lass], I wasn't generalising about the whole dwarf species, I had just stolen a bundle of jewels from a very specific group of dwarves who happened to have an odious stench about them!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh. Well I guess that's okay then. Please continue.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Well, as I headed on me merry way, hoping the foul odours that lingered in me nostrils would soon pass, I see in front of me this explorer fella, all decked out in in his fine clothing, and carrying some long package

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: bundled in rags.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: So I says to meself, 'Rennard', I says, 'Rennard, why would some fella all dressed in his finery be carrying something wrapped in dirty rags?'.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: So I thinks to meself a little more, 'Rennard', I thinks, 'Rennard, maybe that fella has something valuable in there, and he covered it in dirty rags so it don't look so valuable'.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: So I coshed this fella round the back of his head with me bag of jewels, picked up his package and was on me merry way afore he comes to.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what happened then?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Well, I makes me way to the closest tavern I knew of that catered to my sort of people...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You mean thieves?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Right ye are, so I makes me way to the nearest friendly tavern, and unwraps the bundle to see what it had inside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: The Staff of Armadyl?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Was it? Ah, I never knew that...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Anysways, I unwraps this staff, and sees it be a god- weapon; I may be just a common thief, but I recognises a weapon not made by mortal hands when I sees one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what did you do then?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Well, I knew such a weapon would be of great value to...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Now that's funny. Can't remember his name, now. The powerful god, lived in the North-east. Took the Mahjarrat away from under Icthlarin's

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: control.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Anyway, I hired me a messenger to go off and let him know I had something I was prepared to sell that I thought he'd be interested in...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Now WHY can't I remember his name? Very odd that...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you sold the staff to this god you can't remember?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Well, that's the other funny thing... He never showed up, he sent some General or other instead.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Hmmm... You know... Thinking back on that, I'm getting the feeling that messenger did a little doublecross of his own, and took

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: me message to the wrong fella.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what was this General's name?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: His name was Zamorak. I remember thinking at the time it was odd, because the fella was a mighty powerful warrior, but was never fully trusted by...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: WHY can't I remember his name???

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you suspect the messenger might have taken the message to the wrong person? So you think it was an accident or deliberate?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Well that I can't tell ya, but if something happened to get me cursed, it's likely the messenger would know what more than me.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: His name was Kharrim, and if he caused me to be stuck like this, I'm gonna fillet him like a dog, ghost or no!

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: I tell ye what, you've given me much to think about so I'd like to offer yer a gift; Here, take these, they were the gloves I stole me first cake with, they might bring yer some luck.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I find this Kharrim then?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Kharrim the messenger... Well, he was always a devoted follower of old General Zamorak, and if I remember rightly Zamorak set up a small base in an old temple near Dareeyak...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: You might want to check around there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Kharrim the messenger... Last I'd heard of him, he'd headed off to Carrallagar to seek his fortune. Ya might want to check around there somewhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Kharrim the messenger... The last I'd heard of that weasel he was claiming he'd found some underground deposit of runite ore guarded by demons and dragons.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: I suspect he was pulling some scam or other, but if you know of such a place, that might be a good place to start checking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, that's all fascinating, but I just don't particularly care. Bye-bye.

sections.title: After Curse of the Empty Lord

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello again Rennard.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Ah, it be you again! What can I do fer ya?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you tell me where I can find Kharrim again?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Kharrim the messenger... Well, he was always a devoted follower of old General Zamorak, and if I remember rightly Zamorak set up a small base in an old temple near Dareeyak...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: You might want to check around there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Kharrim the messenger... Last I'd heard of him, he'd headed off to Carrallagar to seek his fortune. Ya might want to check around there somewhere.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Kharrim the messenger... The last I'd heard of that weasel he was claiming he'd found some underground deposit of runite ore guarded by demons and dragons.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: I suspect he was pulling some scam or other, but if you know of such a place, that might be a good place to start checking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, well I'll try and find him for you then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have more of those ghostly robes you gave me?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: It seems as though the curse that keeps me here extends to my very clothing... which piece do you want?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Here you go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: The endless tragedy of fate... Why must you torment me so?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Alright, alright, calm down, calm down. All I said was 'hello'!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: You can see me?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Uh... yes?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: And you understand my words?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, most of them...

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: This is incredible! How can such a thing have come to pass?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can I say? I'm a professional.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Hello back at you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what's a nice ghost like you doing in a place like this?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: I suppose you think that's funny?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... Mildly amusing I guess.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: I don't think I want to talk to you anymore.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Hello stranger. It is rare indeed that I meet one who can see my presence, let alone one who can understand my words.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Soooo.... Is it fun being a ghost?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Does it look like fun to you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm... Well, yes actually.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Then you are a fool, and I will waste no more words upon you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What, not even 'goodbye'?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sheesh, what a grouch. You'd think you'd have more of a sense of humour being dead and all.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Mortal... Take heed of my example, and waste not your life, lest you may suffer the same fate as myself...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh? You mean someone did this to you?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: You have ascertained the truth in my words...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So who did it to you? And why?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Events of moons past, I remember not clearly...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Fine help you are then.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Hello stranger.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So.... Invisible ghost haunting the same place for thousands of years, huh?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: You have no idea...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well, bad luck and all that. See ya around!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hello there.

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Hello.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you're a ghost, huh?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: Apparently.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: In which case I only have one thing to say to you:

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: ...what?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Guess you don't have the amulet of humanspeak, huh?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: ...huh?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yeah, that's right. WOO! WOOOWOOO WOO WOOOOWOO! Got no comeback for that, have you?

lines.speaker: Mysterious ghost
lines.text: You are very strange...
